deploy.preDeployCommand: npm run db:migrate && npm run seed:pages && npm run seed:site

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Set to ${{ PostgreSQL.DATABASE_URL }} (reference variable from PostgreSQL service)

AUTH_SECRET.description: Admin session encryption secret. Generate a long random string (32+ chars). Used for secure cookies.

SETTINGS_SECRET.description: Optional: AES-256-GCM encryption for admin-stored API keys. Falls back to AUTH_SECRET if unset.

EMBED_DIM.description: Embedding dimension. MUST match your embedding model output (qwen3-embedding:4b = 2560)

OPENROUTER_MODEL.description: OpenRouter model to use for chat/generation

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: OpenRouter API key for remote LLM inference. If empty, chat feature falls back to Ollama.

OLLAMA_HOST.description: Ollama service endpoint (local fallback for chat)

OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL.description: Ollama model for chat (used as fallback if OpenRouter not configured)
